text: The sterile clarity of the glass-walled meeting room makes me feel like an observer, separate yet implicated in the design of modern collaboration. Entering the vividly colored R+D exhibition, I am drawn into a realm where technology and human intention collide—the wall's assertive declarations prompt me toward reflection. Here, surrounded by symbols of innovation and inquiry, I feel a subtle thrill of curiosity, mixed with a profound sense of the questions that propel us ever onward. The space seems to invite both analysis and wonder.
